title: Quantization for sequences of blow-up solutions to an elliptic equation having nonlocal exponential nonlinearity
summary: This work provides a description of the asymptotic behavior of sequences of solutions to an elliptic equation with a nonlocal exponential nonlinearity of Choquard type. The equation under consideration is a nonlocal analog of the classical prescribed Gaussian curvature equation. A concentration-compactness alternative is established for sequences of solutions to the equation under consideration whenever suitable integrability assumptions on the solutions and the curvature functions are satisfied. Under further regularity assumptions on the curvature functions, and when blow-up occurs in the concentration-compactness alternative, an energy quantization result is established.

AI.tldr: 建立了带Choquard型非局部指数非线性椭圆方程解序列的渐近行为描述，包括浓度-紧致二择性和能量量子化结果。
AI.motivation: 研究带非局部指数非线性（Choquard型）的椭圆方程解序列的渐近行为，该方程是经典规定高斯曲率方程的非局部类比，旨在理解解序列的收敛性和可能的爆破现象。
AI.techniques: 浓度-紧致原理方法，非局部变分分析，能量估计，在解和曲率函数满足适当可积性假设下建立二择性，进一步在曲率函数正则性假设下分析爆破情形。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在解和曲率函数满足适当可积性条件下，建立了浓度-紧致二择性；2) 在曲率函数进一步正则性假设下，当爆破发生时建立了能量量子化结果。
AI.significance: 为Choquard型非局部指数非线性椭圆方程提供了系统的渐近分析框架，推广了经典规定曲率方程的理论，对非局部变分问题和几何分析有重要意义。

title: On non-uniqueness for the system $\bu_t+(\bu\cdot\nabla)\bu=μΔ{\bf u}$
summary:
Explicit irrotational solutions, obtained via the Cole-Hopf transform from the multi-d heat
  equation, give examples of non-uniqueness for the Cauchy problem in supercritical
  $L^p$, $W^{1,p}$, and $W^{2,p}$ regimes.
  We verify non-uniqueness of the trivial solution in the sense of $L^p(\RR^n)$, whenever $n\geq2$
  and $1\leq p<n$. The same solutions give non-uniqueness in $W^{1,p}(\RR^n)$
  and $W^{2,p}(\RR^n)$ for $1\leq p<\frac{n}{2}$ and $1\leq p<\frac{n}{3}$,
  respectively. The main example provides solutions which are classical for
  strictly positive times, and vanish in the stated norms, but explode in $L^\infty(\RR^n)$,
  as $t\to0+$. The non-uniqueness is unrelated to the
  Tikhonov non-uniqueness phenomenon for the heat equation.

AI.tldr: 通过Cole-Hopf变换从多维热方程构造显式无旋解，证明了超临界L^p、W^{1,p}和W^{2,p}空间中柯西问题的非唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究柯西问题在超临界函数空间中的解的唯一性问题，特别是对于Navier-Stokes方程等流体力学方程，在低正则性空间中的解的唯一性是重要的开放问题
AI.techniques: 使用Cole-Hopf变换从多维热方程构造显式解，通过分析解的渐近行为，证明在特定L^p和Sobolev空间中的非唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 对于n≥2，当1≤p<n时，在L^p(ℝ^n)中存在平凡解的非唯一性；当1≤p<n/2时在W^{1,p}(ℝ^n)中，1≤p<n/3时在W^{2,p}(ℝ^n)中存在非唯一性；构造的解在正时间经典，在t→0+时在指定范数中消失但在L^∞中爆炸
AI.significance: 揭示了在超临界函数空间中柯西问题的非唯一性现象，与Tikhonov非唯一性现象不同，对理解流体力学方程在低正则性空间中的解的结构有重要意义

title: The Boltzmann Equation for 2D Taylor-Couette Flow
comment: 69 pages, 1 figure. All comments are welcome
summary: In this paper, we investigate the existence of 2-D Taylor-Couette flow for a rarefied gas between two coaxial rotating cylinders, characterized by differing angular velocities at the outer boundary $\{r=1\}$ and the inner boundary $\{r=r_{1}>0\}$, with a small relative strength denoted by $α$. We formulate the problem using the steady Boltzmann equation in polar coordinates and seek a solution invariant under rotation. We assume that the steady state has the specific form $F(r,v_{r},v_φ-α\frac{r-r_{1}}{1-r_{1}},v_{z})$, where the translation angular velocity $α\frac{r-r_{1}}{1-r_{1}}$ is linearly sheared along the radial direction. With this ansatz, the problem is reduced to solve the nonlinear steady Boltzmann equation with geometric correction, subject to an external shear force of strength $α$ and the homogeneous non-moving diffuse reflection boundary condition. We establish the existence of a non-equilibrium steady solution for any small enough shear rate $α$ through Caflisch's decomposition, complemented by careful uniform estimates based on Guo's $L^{\infty} \cap L^2$ framework. The steady profile displays a polynomial tail behavior at large velocities. For the proof, we develop a delicate double-parameter $(ε,σ)$-approximation argument for the construction of solutions. In particular, we obtain uniform macroscopic dissipation estimates in the absence of mass conservation for $σ\in [0,1)$ getting close to 1. Additionally, due to the non-trivial geometric effects, we develop subtle constructions of test functions by solving second-order ODEs with geometric corrections to establish macroscopic dissipation. Furthermore, we justify the non-negativity of the steady profile by demonstrating its large-time asymptotic stability with an exponential convergence rate under radial perturbations.

AI.tldr: 建立了稀薄气体二维Taylor-Couette流动在任意小剪切率下的非平衡稳态解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究两个同轴旋转圆柱间稀薄气体的Taylor-Couette流动，其中外边界和内边界具有不同角速度，相对强度为小参数α，使用稳态Boltzmann方程描述
AI.techniques: Caflisch分解、Guo的L∞∩L²框架、双参数(ε,σ)逼近论证、二阶ODE测试函数构造、宏观耗散估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于任意足够小的剪切率α，存在非平衡稳态解；稳态分布在大速度处呈现多项式衰减；证明了稳态解的非负性和在径向扰动下的指数收敛稳定性
AI.significance: 首次从动理学理论严格证明了稀薄气体Taylor-Couette流动的存在性，为稀薄气体动力学中的几何效应和非平衡稳态提供了理论基础

title: Weighted Robin eigenvalue problems and nonlinear elliptic equations with general growth in the gradient
summary:
We prove an existence result for Robin boundary value problems modeled on \[
  \begin{cases}
  Δu + |\nabla u|^2 + λf(x) = 0 & \text{in } Ω
  \\ \frac{\partial u}{\partial ν} + βu = 0 & \text{on } \partialΩ\end{cases} \] where $Ω$ is a bounded, sufficiently smooth open set in $\mathbb R^N$, $f(x)$ belongs to the Marcinkiewicz space $M^{\frac N2}$ and {$β>0$}, under a smallness assumption on the datum $λ$. In order to study such problem, we will show several properties of the weighted, singular Robin eigenvalue problem \[ λ_{1,f,γ}(Ω)= \inf_{ψ\in H^{1},\;\int_Ωfψ^{2}=1}\left\{\int_Ω|\nabla ψ|^{2}dx+γ\int_{\partialΩ}ψ^{2}\right\}. \]

AI.tldr: 证明了带Robin边界条件的非线性椭圆方程在Marcinkiewicz空间数据下的存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有梯度平方项和Robin边界条件的非线性椭圆方程，其中源项属于Marcinkiewicz空间，这类问题在奇异系数和边界条件处理上具有挑战性
AI.techniques: 引入并分析加权奇异Robin特征值问题，使用变分方法、极小化原理，以及对Marcinkiewicz空间数据的处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了加权奇异Robin特征值问题的性质；2. 证明了在数据λ足够小的条件下，原Robin边值问题解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异椭圆方程理论，为处理Marcinkiewicz空间数据和Robin边界条件的非线性问题提供了新方法，在数学物理和几何分析中有潜在应用

title: Fractional hypocoercivity in bounded domains in the anomalous diffusion limit
summary: In this paper, we provide a result of exponential stability for several dissipative linear kinetic equations with heavy-tailed equilibria. The approach, inspired by the so-called $L^2$-hypocoercivity method, is robust enough to provide estimates that are uniform in the anomalous diffusion limit. Moreover, it is able to deal with bounded domains with periodic boundary condition or general Maxwell boundary condition (from the pure specular to the pure diffusive case). In addition, our framework accommodates linear collisional operators that act simultaneously on the velocity and spatial variables.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有重尾平衡态的耗散线性动理学方程的指数稳定性结果，其估计在反常扩散极限下一致
AI.motivation: 研究具有重尾平衡态的耗散线性动理学方程的稳定性问题，特别是在反常扩散极限下的行为，以及在有界域上处理各种边界条件
AI.techniques: 采用L²-亚余强制性方法，该方法足够鲁棒以提供在反常扩散极限下的一致估计，并能处理周期边界条件和一般Maxwell边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了多个耗散线性动理学方程的指数稳定性结果，估计在反常扩散极限下一致，适用于有界域上的周期边界条件和从纯镜面反射到纯扩散的一般Maxwell边界条件
AI.significance: 为具有重尾平衡态的动理学方程提供了统一的稳定性分析框架，能够处理复杂的边界条件和同时作用于速度和空间变量的线性碰撞算子，在反常扩散极限下保持一致性

title: A supersolution approach to doubly degenerate parabolic equations with weights
summary:
We consider the Cauchy problem in the Euclidean space for a doubly
  degenerate parabolic equation with a space-dependent exponential
  weight, where the exponent satisfies the doubling condition. In
  particular, both the so called logconvex and logconcave cases may be
  considered. Under the additional natural assumptions we construct
  supersolutions and subsolutions allowing us to control the precise
  sharp temporal decay bounds. We apply our results also to an
  equation with inhomogeneous density, via a suitable variable
  transformation.

AI.tldr: 研究带空间依赖指数权重的双重退化抛物方程Cauchy问题，在加倍条件下建立精确的时间衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究欧几里得空间中带空间依赖指数权重的双重退化抛物方程的Cauchy问题，其中指数满足加倍条件，包括对数凸和对数凹两种情况，旨在建立精确的时间衰减估计
AI.techniques: 构造超解和次解方法，通过变量变换处理非齐次密度方程，利用加倍条件分析指数权重的影响
AI.main_theorems: 在自然假设下构造超解和次解，获得精确的尖锐时间衰减界限，并将结果应用于非齐次密度方程
AI.significance: 为带空间依赖指数权重的退化抛物方程提供了精确的衰减估计理论框架，扩展了对数凸和对数凹情况的分析，对理解此类方程的长时行为有重要意义

title: Supersonic sonic patch solution for the two-dimensional Euler equations with a van der Waals equation of state
summary: We investigate supersonic transonic phenomena in the two-dimensional compressible Euler equations governed by a polytropic van der Waals equation of state. In contrast to the ideal gas setting, the non-ideal pressure law introduces stronger nonlinear effects and modifies the degeneracy structure near sonic states, which significantly complicates the analytical treatment of transonic flows. Within the self-similar framework associated with the four-state Riemann problem, we construct a supersonic sonic patch solution that connects a strictly supersonic region to a sonic boundary along a pseudo streamline. The analysis is based on a characteristic decomposition combined with a partial hodograph transformation, through which the problem is reformulated as a degenerate hyperbolic system. We establish the existence of a globally defined supersonic solution and prove its uniform regularity up to the sonic curve. In addition, we investigate the regularity properties of the resulting sonic boundary. Our results extend the theory of supersonic sonic patches from polytropic gases to a realistic non-ideal gas model.

AI.tldr: 在二维可压缩欧拉方程中，针对范德瓦尔斯状态方程，首次构造了连接超音速区域与音速边界的超音速音速斑块解
AI.motivation: 研究非理想气体（范德瓦尔斯状态方程）中的超音速跨音速现象，与理想气体相比，非理想压力定律引入了更强的非线性效应并改变了音速状态附近的退化结构，这使得跨音速流的分析处理更加复杂
AI.techniques: 自相似框架（四状态黎曼问题）、特征分解与部分速端变换相结合，将问题重新表述为退化双曲系统
AI.main_theorems: 构造了连接严格超音速区域与音速边界的超音速音速斑块解，证明了全局定义的超音速解的存在性及其到音速曲线的一致正则性，并研究了所得音速边界的正则性
AI.significance: 将超音速音速斑块理论从多方气体扩展到现实的非理想气体模型，为非理想气体中的跨音速现象提供了理论基础

title: Global attractors for the Signorini problem with pointwise damping
summary: The existence of global attractors is investigated for the Signorini problem with pointwise dissipation. It is shown that both the semilinear Signorini problem and the elastic obstacle problem with normal compliance exhibit exponential decay to zero and admit compact global attractors. To establish these results, the original problem is approximated by a hybrid PDE-ODE system, which allows for a rigorous analysis of well-posedness and the long-time behavior of its solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究了带点耗散的Signorini问题的全局吸引子存在性，证明了半线性Signorini问题和弹性障碍问题具有指数衰减到零的性质并存在紧全局吸引子。
AI.motivation: 研究Signorini问题（一种带有单边约束的接触问题）在点耗散作用下的长时间行为，这类问题在弹性力学和接触力学中具有重要应用，但关于其全局吸引子存在性的研究相对较少。
AI.techniques: 采用混合PDE-ODE系统逼近原问题，通过这种近似方法对解的存在唯一性和长时间行为进行严格分析，利用指数衰减估计证明全局吸引子的存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了半线性Signorini问题和弹性障碍问题（带法向柔度）的解指数衰减到零，并且存在紧的全局吸引子。
AI.significance: 为带单边约束的接触问题提供了长时间行为分析的理论框架，扩展了全局吸引子理论在接触力学中的应用，对弹性障碍问题和Signorini问题的稳定性分析有重要贡献。
